title: TC4 Infusion Enchantment Parity + Bulk Porting Accelerator
strict_rule: Exact original Thaumcraft 4 parity only; no new mechanics or fake replacements until original TC4 is complete.
done: Preserved all 24 original ConfigRecipes.addInfusionEnchantmentRecipe entries as a dedicated Stage154 index.
Kept Infusion Enchantments separate from item-result infusion recipes; they are not emitted as fake JSON item recipes.
Mapped 22 vanilla TC4 enchantments to modern Minecraft enchantment ids and preserved 2 TC4 custom enchantments as thaumcraft:repair and thaumcraft:haste.
Added Stage154 audit and CI wiring.
Added bulk-stage accelerator report helper to group future exact parity work into larger safe batches.
next_stage: Stage155/156 bulk exact recipe resolver and aspect-scanner batch, if user wants acceleration.
